# ForwardPass

The Weekly AI Update for Decision Makers is a curated set of key news, advancements, courses and content to help you navigate the world of AI in under 5 minutes - topped with an original cartoon!

Each week the update is curated by Alister Palmer of ForwardPass Technology with 18 years industry experience spanning Capital Markets, enterprise AI and a Masters of Data Science.

ForwardPass Technology offers AI workshops for executive teams in Australia - contact alister@forwardpasstechnology.com for details

Thanks for reading _The Weekly AI Update for Decision Makers_! Subscribe for free to receive new posts:
